description_long: This is a classic British-style red telephone booth with a rectangular structure and a slightly domed roof. The booth features a prominent grid of glass window panes on three sides, with the front side containing a hinged door that is currently open. The door and window frames are painted in a vibrant red, while the base is black and the roof has a slightly curved, ridged design. The interior appears to have a black floor and a telephone unit mounted on the side wall, with a visible handset. There is a white sign panel above the door, but no visible text or labeling. The overall construction suggests a robust, weather-resistant design suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description: A classic red British-style telephone booth with glass-paneled windows, an open door, and a domed roof. The booth features a black base and a visible telephone handset inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open door, interior telephone unit, and the grid of glass window panes.
description_view_1: Side view with the door fully open, revealing the booth's interior and the window grid on the side.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back window grid and a partial view of the telephone unit inside.
description_view_3: Back view with no windows, showing a solid red panel and the open door extending outward.
attribute_window_configuration: multiple rectangular glass panes on three sides, solid panel on the back
attribute_signage_or_labeling: white sign panel above the door, no visible text
